Bone 1 [i](You must spend at least 1 bone mana to play this card.)[/i]
{2}, Exert: Attack 1. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each card you’ve discarded this turn. [i](Choose an opponent. They choose themselves or a card they control that has obstruct. If they chose themselves, they lose 1 health. If they chose a card they control, remove 1 endurance counter from it.)[/i]
